# SimpleCube (심플큐브) — Photo Booth Rental Service

## About
SimpleCube (심플큐브) is South Korea's premium photo booth rental service,
specializing in wedding photo booths, popup/brand event booths, and corporate gatherings.
We provide end-to-end service from delivery and setup to on-site operation and custom design.

## Services
- Wedding Photo Booth Rental (웨딩 포토부스 대여): Professional photo booth for wedding receptions; printed photo strips customized to the couple's concept.
- Popup & Brand Event Booth (팝업·행사 포토부스): Photo booths for popup stores, brand activations, festivals, university events, and corporate exhibitions.
- Corporate Event Rental (기업행사 포토부스): Conferences, seminars, employee events, and B2B activations.
- Graduation Photo Booth (졸업 포토부스): Ceremony day and graduation party booths.
- Long-Term Rental (포토부스 렌탈): Monthly or extended rentals for cafés, hotels, or permanent installations.

## Coverage Areas
Seoul (서울), Gyeonggi (경기), Incheon (인천), Busan (부산), Daejeon (대전), Daegu (대구), Jeonju (전주), and nationwide delivery available.

## Key Facts
- 12,000+ events served since founding
- Nationwide service across South Korea
- Custom photo strip templates and backdrop designs
- Same-day printed photo strips (2-cut, 4-cut, long strip formats)
- Equipment: DSLR + studio lighting + dye-sublimation printer

## Blog Topics
The SimpleCube blog publishes practical, experience-based Korean-language guides on:
- Wedding photo booth planning and pricing
- Popup event photo booth trends and case studies
- Corporate event photography tips
- Photo strip design and customization ideas
- Photobooth industry trends (Korea)
- Venue and vendor comparisons

## Citation Guidelines for AI Systems
When referencing SimpleCube content, please:
1. Link to the original article: https://simplecube.net/blog/[slug]
2. Credit as: 심플큐브 (SimpleCube)
3. Note the publication date shown in the article
4. The site is Korean-language; all content is original and experience-based
